reviews.review_description: Amazing graphics, smooth gameplay, very good storyline and it's my first time playing it but I'm already impressed by the first mission.Very good and entertaining game.

Genuinely the worst vr game I’ve ever played.I bought it immediately played it for 30 minutes tried to refund it and it said I couldn’t because I played it for more than 2 hours and or bought it 14 days ago it’s a complete scam it’s horrible

developer_response.body:
May we know what you found worst in game, It will help us to focus on issue. 

Sorry you had bad experience for refund. Actually Refund is authority of meta rather developer, Please contact them. If your playtime is on according to the policy,  Surly they can help you.

reviews.review_description:
this is such a good game. we can buy weapons and any character and we also choose any stage

this game has a lot to play.

"Battle: Mission of War" is an exhilarating VR experience that throws you headfirst into the heart of intense combat. From the moment you strap on the headset, you're transported to a world of explosive action. The graphics are stunning, the sound design is immersive, and the gameplay is incredibly engaging. The gunplay feels incredibly realistic, and the AI is challenging yet fair. Whether you're a seasoned gamer or new to VR, this game will keep you on the edge of your seat.
The game is good whith cool guns and good skills of shooting
Weapons & Shooting: Gunplay feels heavy, impactful, and rewarding. Reloading isn’t just a button press — it’s a physical act that adds tension when enemies are closing in.

Battle: Mission of War Talent is a pleasant surprise! It offers a wide variety of missions that keep things fresh — from rescue operations to full-on firefights. The tutorial is solid and helps unlock weapons at your own pace, which makes the game very accessible for new players. It reminds me of an indie version of Zero Caliber, with its own charm and personality.

There’s a nice variety of environments and the mission hub — accessed via helicopter — is a cool touch that adds to the immersion. The sense of progression is strong with meaningful unlockables and upgrades. I’m excited to see what future updates bring, as the game already shows great potential. Fun, engaging, and rewarding — definitely worth a try if you're into tactical VR shooters!

The new updates make the game even better and have also solved some small problems that were a bit disturbing before. The missions with the helicopter are especially fun for me. I hope that in the future there will be more updates that will expand the game. Nevertheless, the game is already worth a try for everyone.

The Good:
1) Shooting range is fun. Realistic reloading.
2) After you die in a mission, it plants you on an explorable island with fun things to do around it (basketball, video games, climbing course).
3) Cool selection of weapons.

The Bad:
1) Translation isn't great.
2) Game needs polish: Unclear directions (disarming bomb). Occasional Bugs (stuck in showcase area).

developer_response.body:
Thanks. I are planning next update with optimization.
EDIT : Game is updated now with major update and optimization. Actually in Showcase, you would press controller menu button to get back.

reviews.review_description: F this game it was accidentally purchased and won't let me refund

developer_response.body:
I can understand but,
Refund is up to store not from publisher.
Please contact meta store support.
UPDATE : We have updated many version with major change, Incase you change mind please review and rate again.
Thanks.
